Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Three Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Gregory M. Haynes, Esq. for Petitioner: Lucretia Howar, present as Guardian at litem for: Lashay Square, Lucinda Square and Larell Square, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $2,000.00 for each of the three minors is approved.
Attorney's Fees $500.00
A net balance of $1,500.00 to each of the three minors, to be depositted into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, Civic Center Branch, Market Street, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Counsel to prepare Orders.

Proposed Order received in court,
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order for Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed by Comm. Kaplan.

Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Gregory Haynes, Esq. for Petitioner: Lucretia Howard, not present.
Jacob Burland, Esq. for Defendant: San Francisco Housing Authority.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Continued To Oct-18-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:

Gregory Melvin Haynes, Esq. on behalf of plaintiffs
Jacob Burland, Esq. on behalf of defendant San Francisco Housing Authority

Matter settled. Settlement of $2,000.00 to each of the following plaintiffs: Emanuel Square, Larell Square, Lucinda Square and Lashay Square. $7,000.00 to Lucretial Square but she is to pay $5,000.00 owed. Each side to bear their own costs. Counsel stipulated to extend the 5-year statutes of limitations.

Request to continue matter to Oct. 18, 2004 for settlement protected date was granted.

Hon. Robert Dondero; Clerks: D. Boffi/V. Mu Reporter: Jo Ann Bryce, #3321 (206)
